strengths: 20 years of technical experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, infrastructure, cloud) exceeding the 15-year requirement
Founded and operated GISCollective for 10 years, demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative, product vision, and independent leadership
Consistent mentoring and teaching track record through workshops, courses, and organizational refactoring dojos
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD despite role preferring advanced degree in AI-related field
Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI-powered products—current AI involvement limited to infrastructure and tooling, not AI innovation
Background emphasizes hands-on technical implementation rather than strategic advisory, product direction, or director-level leadership
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings substantial technical depth across 20 years of engineering experience and demonstrates entrepreneurial capability through founding GISCollective, meeting core experience and initiative requirements. However, this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role specifically targets AI innovation and strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products—areas in which the candidate shows minimal background, with current AI involvement limited to infrastructure and tooling. Additionally, the director-level responsibilities of advising customers on AI adoption, identifying future product state, and inspiring teams demand proven strategic and advisory leadership experience, whereas the candidate's strength lies in hands-on technical execution. The candidate would be better positioned for a senior technical engineering role than for this strategic AI leadership function.
